title: vismia baccifera subsp. baccifera
intro: Vismia baccifera subsp. baccifera is a plant species belonging to the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the sapindaceae or stomachache tree. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of gastrointestinal problems. Vismia baccifera subsp. baccifera can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine practices.
